name: @mcp-studio/llm-provider
description: Provider-agnostic LLM streaming + ReAct loop. Renderer-only consumption: the chat view initiates the stream, tool-use blocks dispatch through window.studio.callTool to main. Main never imports this package directly — it sees AI-attributed tool calls via the M5 caller arg on the tools:call IPC and routes them through the M3 pending-changes safety boundary.
